review_notes: The control A.5.22 is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves monitoring, reviewing, and managing changes in supplier services, which can be mapped to Kubernetes security features. The original function names were somewhat descriptive but needed refinement for clarity and consistency with naming conventions. The changes ensure that the function names are more descriptive, specific, and consistent with the pattern k8s_<resource>_<check_description>. The functions map well to the intended security controls in Kubernetes.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names clearly describe the specific check being performed and follow the k8s_<resource>_<check_description> pattern.
title: Monitor, Review And Change Management Of Supplier Services
step1_reasoning: The control A.5.22 focuses on monitoring, reviewing, and managing changes in supplier services. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC policies are reviewed and updated to reflect changes in supplier services, logging changes to supplier-related configurations, using admission controllers to enforce change management policies, and monitoring network policies to ensure supplier services are appropriately controlled. These functions ensure that any changes in supplier services are tracked, reviewed, and managed within the Kubernetes environment.
